name: Active inference tools
description: Adds query templates, verification classes, pass criteria, and sensor specs framed around active inference / FEP.

rows.call_when: User invokes Friston / active inference / free energy framings.
rows.query_template: Discuss the topic in terms of variational free-energy minimization vs Bayesian brain accounts.

rows.call_when: An FEP-style claim needs to be made testable.
rows.role: Translate the claim into a falsifiable prediction with a measurable signal.

rows.call_when: An agent loop reports prediction error.
rows.pass_criterion: Mean absolute prediction error stays below the calibrated baseline for the last N steps.

rows.call_when: User mentions arousal, stress, or autonomic signals.
rows.primary_role: Interoceptive arousal proxy for affective state estimation.
